config.update_check_hint: On launch, check formidable.tools for a newer release. Off by default. Fails silently when offline.
settings.advanced.info: Advanced system options. Use with caution.
settings.apply_confirm.body: Some changes you made only take effect at launch. Formidable will close and reopen.
settings.apply_confirm.title: Restart Formidable?
settings.templates.info: Choose which templates appear in the storage picker, wiki and other use-side surfaces. Each toggle is literal: only the templates switched on are visible. Turn everything off to show none.
settings.templates.none_enabled: No templates enabled: nothing is visible on the use-side. Toggle templates on to make them appear.
settings.templates.toggle_all_desc: Turn all the templates shown here on or off at once.
settings.desc.context_directory: Root folder for templates and form storage.
settings.desc.decimal_precision: Decimal places for chart percentage labels (0–3). 0 shows whole numbers.
settings.desc.sidebar_width: Width in pixels (180–500). Manual drag is session-only and won't change this value.
settings.desc.toast_timeout: How long toasts stay visible, in seconds (2–15).
settings.display.info: Configure the display theme and visibility of UI elements.
settings.desc.git_self_cloned: Use the system git binary for fetch/push/pull.
settings.desc.remote_backend: Configure the backend's connection details in the Collaboration workspace.
settings.general.info: Configure author details like name, email and language.
settings.history.info: Configure history settings like enabled, persist and max size.
settings.internal_server.info: Configure the built-in server and set the listening port.
settings.no_profile:
Pick a profile from the Profiles workspace,
or create a new one.
settings.locations.info: Configure the context folder and the optional remote backend (Git or GiGot).
settings.title: Settings
